title: Add Ai Web Translator to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Ai Web Translator](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/ai-web-translator-byok/) to learn
- Enable AI Web Translation with BYOK support.

Fixes #10091

gist.headline: Speaking your language
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the Greenhouse! AI Web Translator is a Firefox add-on that brings BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) AI translation right to your browser.
gist.summary: Added the AI Web Translator Firefox add-on to the community apps showcase, featuring Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) support for web translation.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and install this community-built extension to seamlessly translate web pages using their own AI API keys.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a web translator extension. Visual symbols: a retro web browser, translation icons (speech bubbles with different symbols), the Pollinations bee interacting with a web page. The robot companion helping translate.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying a web page with floating speech bubbles containing different language symbols. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT head stands nearby holding a glowing translation dictionary. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
